svg.title: Form Interpretation Algorithm
svg.desc: Flowchart of the FIA loop: select unfilled field, prompt, wait for input, validate, handle events or fill and advance, execute block when all fields filled

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the FIA select the next unfilled field?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the FIA plays a field prompt?')
sendPrompt('What input does the voice browser accept during a field?')
sendPrompt('How does the voice browser validate caller input against a grammar?')
sendPrompt('What events does the FIA throw on invalid or missing input?')
sendPrompt('How does a catch handler respond to noinput or nomatch?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a field variable is filled in VoiceXML?')
sendPrompt('How does the FIA know when all fields are filled?')
sendPrompt('What does the FIA execute when all fields are filled?')
